title: kickxia commutata subsp. graeca
intro: Kickxia commutata subsp. graeca, also known as Greek red-ratio or Greek red rati, is a flowering plant species within the family Plantaginaceae, a type of plant native to the mountainous regions of Greece. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Kickxia commutata subsp. graeca include relieving congestion, reducing inflammation, and soothing coughs, making it a popular herbal remedy for respiratory ailments. Herbal preparations of Kickxia commutata subsp. graeca typically involve drying the leaves and flowers to make teas, infusions, or tinctures for consumption.
